idea-plugin:
com.github.xinxianwu.emitternavigator emitter-navigator xinxianwu
com.intellij.modules.platform
Emitter Navigator provides Go-to-Declaration (F12) navigation between event emitters and listeners in JavaScript/TypeScript projects.
Press F12 on any event name string inside an emit or on call to jump to all paired counterparts across the project.
Features: - Navigate between emit() and on() call pairs via F12 - Supports js, ts, jsx, tsx, and vue files - Customizable method names via Settings → Tools → Emitter Navigation - Per-method event argument index (e.g. send_io_room:1 for the second argument) - Variable reference support: const key = "event" can be used as the event argument
